text_raw: At last. A sagacious soul unfurls the fan.
text_clean: At last. A sagacious soul unfurls the fan.

text_raw: It's all I could leave behind given my grave condition.
text_clean: It's all I could leave behind given my grave condition.

text_raw: My name is {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Witch_Megu#Maegu}, a witch of Do arts from the east.
text_clean: My name is {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Witch_Megu#Maegu}, a witch of Do arts from the east.

text_raw: On our way here, our ship was hit by cannon fire, forcing us ashore.
text_clean: On our way here, our ship was hit by cannon fire, forcing us ashore.

text_raw: Then... Someone took my sister.
text_clean: Then... Someone took my sister.

text_raw: All I want is to look for her...
text_clean: All I want is to look for her...

text_raw: But my wounds have left me too weak to make use of my powers.
text_clean: But my wounds have left me too weak to make use of my powers.

text_raw: Burn a talisman upon the censer and ring the bells, then the wind will guide you to her.
text_clean: Burn a talisman upon the censer and ring the bells, then the wind will guide you to her.

text_raw: You'll find what you need on the shore, by our ship.
text_clean: You'll find what you need on the shore, by our ship.

text_raw: Aye. A boulder fell from the sky and smashed right through it.
text_clean: Aye. A boulder fell from the sky and smashed right through it.

text_raw: What's the world coming to...
text_clean: What's the world coming to...

text_raw: Word is, the same's happened in Hernand! Boulders falling from the sky!
text_clean: Word is, the same's happened in Hernand! Boulders falling from the sky!

text_raw: Solumen can't be pleased with us.
text_clean: Solumen can't be pleased with us.

text_raw: And the ghost. Did you hear that one?
text_clean: And the ghost. Did you hear that one?

text_raw: Well, I'd rather worry about what really matters... like what's for dinner.
text_clean: Well, I'd rather worry about what really matters... like what's for dinner.

text_raw: I'm telling you, I saw it clear as day. Running from Shipwreck Shore into the woods.
text_clean: I'm telling you, I saw it clear as day. Running from Shipwreck Shore into the woods.

text_raw: The face of a young maiden, but hair as white as snow.
text_clean: The face of a young maiden, but hair as white as snow.

text_raw: Gives me the shivers just remembering it.
text_clean: Gives me the shivers just remembering it.

text_raw: You don't think she's cursed us, do you?
text_clean: You don't think she's cursed us, do you?

text_raw: I'm not ready to go to my grave just yet...
text_clean: I'm not ready to go to my grave just yet...

text_raw: Oh, will you stop with that witch nonsense?
text_clean: Oh, will you stop with that witch nonsense?

text_raw: Oh, give over, you're being daft.
text_clean: Oh, give over, you're being daft.

text_raw:
Have you heard?
The guards are saying witches on the coast are to blame for all these crows.
text_clean:
Have you heard?
The guards are saying witches on the coast are to blame for all these crows.

text_raw: It seems so. Word is, they caught one already, but the other got away.
text_clean: It seems so. Word is, they caught one already, but the other got away.

text_raw: So that's what all this fuss is about? A witch hunt?
text_clean: So that's what all this fuss is about? A witch hunt?

text_raw: Yes, it calls from the hilltop fort.
text_clean: Yes, it calls from the hilltop fort.

text_raw: My sister {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Witch_Usa#Woosa} is of the Woodo School. She commands the wind and rain.
text_clean: My sister {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Witch_Usa#Woosa} is of the Woodo School. She commands the wind and rain.

text_raw: The wind can always find its master.
text_clean: The wind can always find its master.

text_raw: Yet it carries the scent of blood and steel.
text_clean: Yet it carries the scent of blood and steel.

text_raw: I fear something terrible is happening.
text_clean: I fear something terrible is happening.

text_raw: Please, you must help her.
text_clean: Please, you must help her.

text_raw: The wind sounds... sorrowful.
text_clean: The wind sounds... sorrowful.

text_raw: I have certainly been better.
text_clean: I have certainly been better.

text_raw: If you hadn't acted so quickly, he'd have...
text_clean: If you hadn't acted so quickly, he'd have...

text_raw: You saved my life. Thank you.
text_clean: You saved my life. Thank you.

text_raw: Just a moment...
text_clean: Just a moment...

text_raw: My wounds are worse than I thought.
text_clean: My wounds are worse than I thought.

text_raw: I'll need to take things a bit slower.
text_clean: I'll need to take things a bit slower.

text_raw: I am in your debt.
text_clean: I am in your debt.

text_raw: Are you alright?
text_clean: Are you alright?

text_raw: I can believe that.
text_clean: I can believe that.

text_raw: Let's get you to your sister... or at least to her voice.
text_clean: Let's get you to your sister... or at least to her voice.

text_raw: Maegu!
text_clean: Maegu!

text_raw: I owe this man my life.
text_clean: I owe this man my life.

text_raw: If you ever need our help, we'll repay your kindness.
text_clean: If you ever need our help, we'll repay your kindness.

text_raw: My sister and I... we happen to have some rare and curious powers.
text_clean: My sister and I... we happen to have some rare and curious powers.

text_raw: That man's plan was to seize our gifts so that he could attempt to meddle with the past.
text_clean: That man's plan was to seize our gifts so that he could attempt to meddle with the past.

text_raw: Tampering with time is perilous, and the art is strictly forbidden.
text_clean: Tampering with time is perilous, and the art is strictly forbidden.

text_raw: There's no way to alter a single, exact event,
text_clean: There's no way to alter a single, exact event,

text_raw: and attempting so could put many in grave danger.
text_clean: and attempting so could put many in grave danger.

text_raw:
We always tread lightly,
using our powers only to mend what has strayed from the natural order.
text_clean:
We always tread lightly,
using our powers only to mend what has strayed from the natural order.

text_raw: And when we do, we often call on our little friends for help.
text_clean: And when we do, we often call on our little friends for help.

text_raw: I'm not sure how he came to know of our gifts,
text_clean: I'm not sure how he came to know of our gifts,

text_raw: but if he had bent such dangerous magic to his will...
text_clean: but if he had bent such dangerous magic to his will...

text_raw: What could have happened is too terrible for me to dwell on.
text_clean: What could have happened is too terrible for me to dwell on.

text_raw: You have my deepest thanks.
text_clean: You have my deepest thanks.

text_raw: Oh, {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Witch_Usa#Woosa}!
text_clean: Oh, {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Witch_Usa#Woosa}!

text_raw: I'm so glad to see you safe!
text_clean: I'm so glad to see you safe!

text_raw: In our land, this is how we show respect to those who help us.
text_clean: In our land, this is how we show respect to those who help us.

text_raw: You have our sincerest thanks.
text_clean: You have our sincerest thanks.

text_raw: Once {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Witch_Usa#Woosa} has recovered, we'll work on restoring her powers.
text_clean: Once {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Witch_Usa#Woosa} has recovered, we'll work on restoring her powers.

text_raw: Then, we'll head to our next destination. Please, accept this gift.
text_clean: Then, we'll head to our next destination. Please, accept this gift.

text_raw: Don't mention it. I was just doing what was right.
text_clean: Don't mention it. I was just doing what was right.

text_raw: Oh, please. Really, it was nothing.
text_clean: Oh, please. Really, it was nothing.

text_raw: So, what do you plan to do now?
text_clean: So, what do you plan to do now?

text_raw: Your words are enough. Please, get some rest.
text_clean: Your words are enough. Please, get some rest.

text_raw: What made him target you?
text_clean: What made him target you?

text_raw: Would you mind keeping close?
text_clean: Would you mind keeping close?
